blocks.text: Hovland sits T36 at even par after a tough R3 finish torpedoed what looked like a comeback round. Berger owns Bay Hill at -13 — the Norwegian needs a near-perfect Sunday to make noise.
🏎️ F1 season opens in Melbourne — Australian GP race weekend underway, race Sunday
🚴 Sat 12:00 — Strade Bianche: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on Tuscany's brutal gravel roads
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP: the biggest CL match in Norwegian football history
